nasb.text: The hand of the Lord was on me there, and He said to me, “Get up, go out to the plain, and there I will speak to you.”

esv.text: And the hand of the Lord was upon me there. And he said to me, “Arise, go out into the valley, and there I will speak with you.”

cnv.text: 耶和華的手在那裡臨到我身上，他對我說：“你起來，出到平原去，在那裡我要向你說話。”

ccb.text: 在那里，耶和华的手按在我身上，对我说：“你起来前往平原，我要在那里对你说话。”
